name: Tuna Logs
recipeIngredient: Lettuce Leaves, cut into 3-inch wide strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together to form tuna salad.
2. Place one or two tablespoons of the mixture on a lettuce leaf.
3. Roll the mixture into a log and secure with a decorative toothpick.
4. Chicken, ham, shrimp, etc., can be used in place of tuna. Makes 2 dozen or more.
